OnClose.description: Callback invoked when the overlay closes. (event callback)

OnOpenChanged.description: Callback invoked when the open state changes. (event callback)

Side.description: Which side of the trigger to position on.

SideOffset.description: Distance in pixels from the trigger.

ChildContent.description: The content to render inside the component. (render fragment)

Class.description: Additional CSS classes to apply to the root element.
